events.title: openai/codex 0.142.2
events.summaryText: ## New Features - MCP tools now use tool search by default when supported, improving tool discovery while preserving compatibility with older models and providers. (#29486) - macOS authentication clients can honor system proxy, PAC, and WPAD settings when `respect_system_proxy` is enabled. (#26709) - Plugins can provide dedicated dark-mode logos through local manifests and remote catalogs. (#29488) - Apps can display richer safety-buffering UI using server-provided visibility and faster-model...

events.title: @openai/codex 0.142.2
events.summaryText: Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.
